#nullable enable
using System;
using System.Runtime.CompilerServices;
using System.Runtime.InteropServices;

internal static class FastData
{

    private static char GetCharAt(string str, int offset) => offset >= 0 ? str[offset] : str[str.Length + offset];
    private static int GetLength(string str) => str.Length;


    private static readonly string[] _keys = new string[] {
        "alpha", "bravo", "charlie", "delta"
    };

    
    public static bool Contains(string key)
    {
        int getLength;
        char getCharAt0;
        char getCharAtNeg1;
        getLength = GetLength(key);
        if ((getLength > 7))
        {
         return false;
        }

        getCharAt0 = GetCharAt(key, 0);
        if ((getCharAt0 > 'd'))
        {
         return false;
        }

        getCharAtNeg1 = GetCharAt(key, -1);
        if ((getCharAtNeg1 > 'o'))
        {
         return false;
        }

        if (((((ulong.MinValue & (1ul << (int)((uint)getCharAtNeg1 & 63u))) & ~(ulong.MinValue - (ulong)((uint)getCharAtNeg1 >> 6))) | ((140883517243392ul & (1ul << (int)((uint)getCharAtNeg1 & 63u))) & (ulong.MinValue - (ulong)((uint)getCharAtNeg1 >> 6)))) == ulong.MinValue))
        {
         return false;
        }



        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
        {
            if (StringComparer.Ordinal.Equals(key, _keys[i]))
                return true;
        }
        return false;
    }

    public const int ItemCount = 4;
    public const int MinKeyLength = 5;
    public const int MaxKeyLength = 7;
    public const bool HasNumber = false;
    public const bool HasUppercase = false;
    public const bool HasLowercase = true;
    public const bool HasSymbol = false;
    public const bool HasWhitespace = false;
}
